name: Fortnox AB
summary: Fortnox AB operates as a cloud-based platform for financial administration for small businesses, accounting firms, associations, and schools. It offers various programs and services for billing, bookkeeping, payroll, and expense management. The company also provides financing services, including invoice interpretation, credit, E-invoice, invoice services, factoring, and invoice factoring; and insurance services.
